description: College Board SAT Suite of Assessments (PSAT 8/9, PSAT 10, PSAT/NMSQT, SAT)

INPUT_FILE.description: Path to CSV file containing PSAT or SAT assessment data

API_YEAR.description: School year for the assessment data (e.g., 2024 for 2023-24 school year)

STATE_FILE.description: Path to earthmover state file for change tracking

STUDENT_ID_NAME.description: Column name containing student unique ID (for student ID crosswalking)

TEST_TYPE.description: Test type: 'psat89', 'psat10', 'psat', 'sat', or 'auto' to detect from file

notes: This bundle supports both old SAT format (pre-2016, 3 sections) and new SAT format (2016+, 2 sections)
Grade level is calculated from COHORT_YEAR and test date
Test type can be auto-detected from column names or specified via TEST_TYPE parameter
CCR benchmarks (EBRW_CCR_BENCHMARK, MATH_CCR_BENCHMARK) are used to determine performance levels
